Video.summary: The guys bring the well-known but anemic 305 SBC into the shop by viewer request.
Video.title: Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build

Image.alt: Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build
Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build
Tearing Down and Prep of Our 305 SBC Build

Video.summary: Pat and Frankie finish building up their jazzed up 305 SBC.
Video.title: Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC

Image.alt: Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC
Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC
Building Up Our Hot Rod 305 SBC

Video.summary: We bring our 305 Small Block Chevy back for a second round of racier upgrades.
Video.title: Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue

Image.alt: Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue
Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue
Return of the 305 SBC: The Upgrades Continue

Video.summary: We take a stock 305 Chevy and a 302 Ford and find out dollar for horsepower who comes out on top.
Video.title: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Image.alt: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Video.summary: 302 vs 305! Round 2 of the classic debate. Budget head swap dyno test. Which 90's head rules?
Video.title: 302 vs. 305 Round 2

Video.summary: 302 SBF vs. 305 SBC battle: We're increasing compression on both, comparing gains head-to-head!
Video.title: 302 vs 305 Pt 3 High Compression Showdown

Video.summary: We're building a 427ci pump-gas LSx for a Music City Trucks C10, aiming for serious hot rod power.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 1

Video.summary: We're finishing our 427ci LSx engine for Music City Trucks' C10, adding EFI and dyno-tuning it.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 2

Video.summary: We're twin-turboing our 600+ HP 427ci Small Block Chevy with new EFI, pushing "Baby Blue" to the limit!
Video.title: Twins for the Win

Video.summary: Engine Power embarks on a new project for SCCA’s inaugural SPEC Mustang class.
Video.title: SCCA SPEC Mustang Part 1

Video.summary: Our SPEC Mustang Project is back for final touches, as we get it ready to hit the track.
Video.title: SCCA SPEC Mustang Part 2

Video.summary: We wrap up the assembly of our Bronco.
Video.title: ’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning

Image.alt: ’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning
’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning
’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning

Video.summary: We're doing a multi-stage 212 CC go-kart engine build to show how to have fun on a budget.
Video.title: Single Cylinder Special

Video.summary: Eric and Joel unearth the Cummins-crown-jewel dually diesel, a ’93 Dodge Ram W350.
Video.title: Diesel Diamond in the Rough

Video.summary: The guys inject some power into their B-series Cummins with a VE to P pump swap on their 93 Dodge Dually.
Video.title: Pump It Up

Video.summary: We yank out our old suspension, upgrade the underside of our Diesel Dually, and give new disc brakes.
Video.title: Lift & Shift

Video.summary: Our Dodge Dually, Project Nightshift, will shed its skin today as we buzz off all the imperfections.
Video.title: Prime Time Axle Folly

Video.summary: We dust off our Test Sled from the pits of darkness and give it a new life.
Video.title: Test Sled Reincarnated Stage 1

Video.summary: Our Test Sled has been rejuvenated with a new engine & transmission.
Video.title: Test Sled Reincarnated Stage 2

Video.summary: From freeway to farmyard, this rugged straight six was everywhere! It’s the subject of our latest build.
Video.title: Ford 300 Inline Six

Video.summary: Even after 45 years, our antique Ford engine still runs.
Video.title: A Fine Inline Six

Video.summary: The six-cylinder Ford’s numbers keep climbing as we give it major cam, piston, and cylinder head upgrades.
Video.title: Ford’s Big Buzzin’ Half Dozen

Video.summary: Brendon Graeves' 1000hp twin-turbo LS '11 BMW M3: a carbon-bodied drift monster engineered for domination!
Video.title: Hot Shots Drift Car

Video.summary: We lay out our plan to rebuild our 1985 Chevy K-10.
Video.title: The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere

Image.alt: The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere
The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere
The Faux Guy: The Series Premiere

Video.summary: The transformation continues on this clean '85 K-10 square body.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Teardown

Video.summary: The frame work for our 1985 Chevy K-10 is being blasted and painted.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Chassis Refresh

Video.summary: We start reassembling our 1985 Chevy K-10 square body. We add steering, brakes, exhaust, and glass.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Assembly

Video.summary: Our K-10 Square body is coming back to life with restoration parts, cooling, and electrical.
Video.title: Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive

Image.alt: Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive
Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive
Faux Guy Square Body Revival, Our K-10 Comes Alive

Video.summary: We wrap up our Chevy K-10 square body build with the final assembly of trim work, bumpers, and more
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body: It’s Finally Finished

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body: It’s Finally Finished
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body: It’s Finally Finished
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body: It’s Finally Finished

Video.summary: Our 305 Small Block Chevy and 302 Small Block Ford return for another round of the brand loyalty war.
Video.title: Small Block Showdown Round 4

Video.summary: The first of a 3 stage build of the durable small block Chevy.
Video.title: In House Power Mouse: Stage I

Image.alt: In House Power Mouse: Stage I
In House Power Mouse: Stage I
In House Power Mouse: Stage I

Video.summary: Stage II of our small block Chevy build gets block modifications.
Video.title: In House Power Mouse: Stage II

Image.alt: In House Power Mouse: Stage II
In House Power Mouse: Stage II
In House Power Mouse: Stage II

Video.summary: Pat and Mike button up their Gen III Hemi with super trick heads, then it's tech tip time with Mike and Pat.
Video.title: Hemi Top End Magic

Video.summary: In Stage 3 of our small-block build, our 383 becomes a 406.
Video.title: In-House Power Mouse Roars

Video.summary: We visit UNOH where we build and dyno a brutal 434ci UMP Modified dirt track engine.
Video.title: 434ci UMP Race Engine

Video.summary: We revive a 505ci RB Mopar with upgrades and a fresh look, unleashing more power for a hotrod build.
Video.title: 505ci Monster Mopar

Video.summary: Our 1985 Chevy K-10 square body gets stripped, sanded and primed. Then we add a two-tone paint job.
Video.title: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint

Image.alt: Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint
Faux Guy K-10 Square Body Two-Tone Paint

Video.summary: We’re turning our 1964 Ford Flatbed into a shop truck!
Video.title: Reinventing a 1964 Ford Flatbed Shop Truck

Image.alt: Reinventing a 1964 Ford Flatbed Shop Truck
Reinventing a 1964 Ford Flatbed Shop Truck
Reinventing a 1964 Ford Flatbed Shop Truck

Video.summary: We plumb the turbocharger in our 1964 Ford Flatbed truck and install the fuel and cooling systems.
Video.title: Turbo-Powered Ford Flatbed Is Ready for a Joyride

Image.alt: Turbo-Powered Ford Flatbed Is Ready for a Joyride
Turbo-Powered Ford Flatbed Is Ready for a Joyride
Turbo-Powered Ford Flatbed Is Ready for a Joyride

Video.summary: We bring our now turbocharged 1964 Ford F350 flatbed shop truck back for upgrades.
Video.title: 1964 Ford F350 Flatbed Shop Truck Upgrades

Image.alt: 1964 Ford F350 Flatbed Shop Truck Upgrades
1964 Ford F350 Flatbed Shop Truck Upgrades
1964 Ford F350 Flatbed Shop Truck Upgrades

Video.summary: We kick off a new Ford F150 build!
Video.title: A Ford F150 Dream Build

Video.summary: EBC Brakes giveaway 2020 F150 gets body mods and upgrades for a sporty dream truck appearance.
Video.title: Ford F150 Dream Truck Part 2

Video.summary: EBC Brakes giveaway 2020 F150 wraps up with more upgrades and a trip to the Grand Ole Opry.
Video.title: Ford F150 Dream Truck Part 3

Video.summary: We revisit the F150 Dream Truck and find out what bolt on upgrades actually do to your horsepower.
Video.title: F150 Dream Truck Reloaded

Video.summary: We bring back our beloved 1965 Ford flatbed shop truck and drop in a 586 HP FE old-school V8.
Video.title: FErocious Ford Part 1

Video.summary: Our ’65 flatbed gets a modern transmission swap to compliment the Ford FE engine.
Video.title: FErocious Ford Part 2

Video.summary: We found a 1977 Granada with a great body, but several mechanical issues, and get it running right!
Video.title: Fatigued Ford

Video.summary: We wanted to build a ride that looks like a Sunday driver…until you step on the throttle!
Video.title: Sleeper Granada Part 2

Video.summary: Our 1977 Ford Granada has achieved sleeper status!
Video.title: Sleeper Granada Part 3

Video.summary: Our 1977 Ford Granada faces its toughest test during a full-throttle day at the drag strip.
Video.title: The Sleeper Awakens

Video.summary: Assembly on the 4.3L engine begins with a solid bottom end.
Video.title: 4.3L Chevy V6 Bottom End Build

Video.summary: The 4.3L engine shows what it can do in the dyno cell!
Video.title: 4.3L Chevy V6 on the Dyno

Video.summary: We crank up the power on our old-school GM 4.3L V6 with some turbocharged forced induction.
Video.title: Turbocharging the GM 4.3L V6
